GMC + Pattern

Type

Loading default…

Stored in IndexedDB on your machine only — not uploaded. The newest saved font loads by default; saving with the same name again replaces that slot and bumps it to “most recent.”

Variable font axes

Motion

359°
—

Space play/pause · ←→ nudge 15° when paused

Sphere & lens

—
—
—
—
—
—

Drag on the sphere to adjust tilt X/Y (same limits as the sliders). Double-click the sphere to reset tilt to defaults.

Depth from center

Camera moves the whole bubble; radial scales zoom type or field in screen space from the sphere center; type Z pulls lettering along the view; field grain scales checker/dots.

—
1.00
0
1.00
1.00

Echo / strobe

—
—
—

Displacement map

Smooth field + optional checker sign per cell. Drift speed only matters when time drift > 0.

—
—
—
—
—
—

Output

—
—

Halftone field

Checker + halftone blobs fill the sphere; type draws on top. Regenerate for a new seed. Controls here (including front-layer dots and field seed) are saved in localStorage for this browser.

SVG viewBox — px (scaled to viewport)

36
36
32

Off: solid field (lighter tone from your checker preset); halftone dots unchanged.

0.12
0.65
4
0.16
0.36
1.00
2.20
2
0.52
4
0.55
1.00
0.82
0.05
0.45
0.50
0.50
0.45
0.00

Halftone vs type

Some dots can draw on top of the letters (second SVG layer). Checker stays behind. Seed-stable random + optional bias toward “big” dots; run-off nudges outward from center.

0
0
0

Presets

Bundled presets load from presets.js on startup. Export/import JSON to sync edits between machines.

Glass & blur
—
—
—

Lettering and halftone blobs blur independently. Frost and shine cover the whole sphere.

Loop export

Seamless loop · 360° arc · no glass · echoes off during export
